race.description: The Sheilas Punters Club Mdn Plate
race.comment: QUEEN'S GAMBLE (12) has not raced since a respectable third on debut over 900m at Newcastle on 31 January. Two recent trials should have her forward enough to run well. Drawing the car park is the only negative. ZUNESHA (14) lines up for the third time after a couple of impressive runs to launch her career. Raced near the speed and found plenty at the business end to grab second over 1000m at Wyong last time. Major player. MAJESTIC LEGEND (6) has found the line well to get up for third in her two runs this time in work, both over 1000m at this circuit. Looms large at this stage of the prep over a slightly longer journey. Capitalist filly MOBILISE (11) is on debut for the Peter Snowden stable. Trialling well and likely to have plenty of admirers. ACHARNEE (1) is back for a second campaign following a 29-week spell. Placed on debut at Gosford so expect her to come to hand quickly again.
